card1.title: Your portfolio sells.
card1.body: Showcase your apps, sell your consulting services, and let clients book a call directly with you. Your code closes the deals.
card1.subtitle: Tech Lead. Turning ideas into products.

card2.title: Real feedback.
card2.body: Get a Squad of testers who find your app's bugs before your customers do.

card3.title: Capture ideas. Manage Roadmaps.
card3.body: Log your random ideas so you don't lose them, and keep professional control of your launched apps' features with an organized Roadmap.

card4.title: Accelerate your build.
card4.body: Your shortcut to production. Copy the rules and prompts used by experts to build without friction and master Vibe Coding.

card5.title: Learn from others.
card5.body: Read the stories and lessons from other builders. Practical guides to ship better software.
card5.article1: How I launched my SaaS in 72 hours
card5.article3: From idea to MVP: my process

card6.title: Build your reputation.
card6.body: Accumulate real milestones. Earn 'Official Tester' or 'Verified App' badges that validate your expertise to the community and clients.
